graph order

adjacency matrix

label vector
32 10 53 64 22 14 12 20 39 26 49 48 16 40 27 21 38 31 29 68 36 35 56 45 18 3 8 34 67 61 19 13 5 41 51 37 11 7 52 9 58 57 62 46 33 24 54 59 23 6 47 4 60 17 50 63 15 2 1 25 42 65 44 30 66 28 43 55
